news.summary: In Brentwood, United Kingdom, on May 16, 2025, it was reported that Mr. William Philip Richards, through his private investment holding corporations - RAB Capital Holdings Limited, Eagles Trust Limited, and RAB Special Situations (Master) Fund Limited - collectively known as the “Reporter," sold a total of 9,061,168 Common Shares of Black Iron Inc. (BKI:TSX) in the open market. This transaction, conducted between January 10, 2025, and May 14, 2025, resulted in an aggregate consideration of $1,536,808. The shares were sold at an average price of $0.1699 per common share.
news.headline: RAB Capital Holdings sells 9,061,168 Common Shares of Black Iron Inc. for $1,536,808, averaging $0.1699 per share.

news.summary: A fiber-optic expansion project costing nearly $13.3 million has been completed by Kinetic, a top provider of fiber internet for homes and businesses, in collaboration with Thomas County. The upgraded internet access has been activated, benefiting numerous residents in Barwick, Boston, Coolidge, Meigs, Ochlocknee, Thomasville, and parts of Pavo. Leaders from Kinetic and Thomas County gathered to commemorate the successful implementation of the project which addresses the growing demand for high-speed internet in today's rapidly evolving digital landscape.
news.headline: 1,600 Thomas County residents can now access Kinetic Fiber Internet after a $13.3 million project completion.

news.summary: A new line of ProCreator Series monitors was introduced by Acer in Taipei on May 16, 2025. These monitors are equipped with Calman-verified, high-resolution displays to improve creative workflows. In addition to this, Acer also launched portable monitors and compact LED projectors. The ProCreator Series monitors boast wide color gamut, providing vivid and accurate colors for professionals. These innovations aim to cater to the growing demands of creative industries.
news.headline: Acer debuts ProCreator Series Monitors with Calman verification; also unveils LED projectors; May 16, 2025.

news.summary: In a recent development in Toronto on May 16, 2025, Visionary has made strides in early cancer screening and home self-testing technologies, drawing considerable interest from the sector. One of Visionary's subsidiaries, American Precision Biotech Inc., played a key role in this advancement. The innovation has sparked widespread industry attention, highlighting the increasing importance of accessible and efficient healthcare solutions.
news.headline: Visionary pioneers new cancer screening tech on May 16, 2025. Breakthrough in self-testing tech attracts industry attention.

news.summary: MediPharm is facing a critical cash shortage with a looming risk of running out of funds by November. The company experienced a significant loss of $3.3 million in Q1 of 2025. However, management has not provided a concrete strategy to attain profitability or a commitment to minimize wastage and extravagant expenses. The situation calls for urgent and substantial changes to secure the future of the company.
news.headline: Apollo Capital warns MediPharm shareholders of insolvency risk due to losses of $3.3 million in Q1 2025. Cash running out by November unless changes made.

news.summary: In Dublin, a new report titled "Protein Alternative Market - Focused Insights 2025-2030" has been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings. The Protein Alternative Market, valued at USD 21.76 billion in 2024, is expected to reach USD 36.17 billion by 2030, with a projected compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 8.84%. The global population is estimated to increase to 8.5 billion by 2030, according to the United Nations, highlighting the necessity for creative food production solutions to meet the growing demand.
news.headline: Protein Alternative Market to reach USD 36.17 billion by 2030, with a CAGR of 8.84% due to rising global population.

news.summary: Bojangles, located in Charlotte, N.C., is introducing a new Limited-Time Offer for the summer season - Watermelon Sweet Tea. Their popular Legendary Iced Tea is combined with real watermelon juice to create a refreshing twist on a classic beverage. This new drink is perfect for summer road trips, afternoon refreshments, or enjoying alongside Bojangles' menu favorites. The release of Watermelon Sweet Tea is accompanied by a special promotion - details to be announced.
news.headline: Bojangles launches Watermelon Sweet Tea for summer, blending its Legendary Iced Tea with real watermelon juice.

news.summary: Sleep Number Corporation (Nasdaq: SNBR) revealed the grant of equity awards on May 15, 2025, to attract its new Executive Vice President and Chief Marketing Officer, Amber Minson. As of her appointment on May 5, 2025, Minson received inducement awards including 21,724 shares. This move was made to secure Minson's commitment and contribution to the company in her new role. The awards were granted to facilitate Minson's employment and to ensure her alignment with Sleep Number's goals.
news.headline: Sleep Number granted 21,724 equity awards to Chief Marketing Officer, Amber Minson, under Nasdaq Rule.

news.summary: Ethereum Merge architect Justin Drake claims it would be cheaper to launch a 51% attack on Bitcoin than on Ethereum, estimating the cost for attacking Bitcoin at around $10 billion, while a successful 51% attack on Ethereum would require a much higher investment. At present, there are 34,168,987 staked Ether worth nearly $89.6 billion, with half of all ETH valued at almost $44.8 billion. However, an attack would likely necessitate a much larger investment due to the current market cap of $316 billion and a 24-hour trading volume of $25 billion for Ether. Matan Sitbon, CEO of blockchain company Lightblocks, emphasized Ethereum's defense mechanisms against such attacks, highlighting the community's social and economic coordination. Drake also noted Ethereum's advantage over Bitcoin, stating that a social layer could identify and respond to attackers, citing PoS's ability to socially slash attackers. The debate around the feasibility of a 51% attack remains open-ended, with high barriers in practicality for both Bitcoin and Ethereum due to computing power, energy, economic, and governance deterrents.
news.headline: Ethereum's 51% attack cost estimated at $10 billion, while Bitcoin's at $8 billion. Ethereum's defense lies in strong social coordination.

news.summary: In Gardena, California, on May 16, 2025, Polar Power, Inc. (NASDAQ: POLA), a leading provider of prime, backup, and solar hybrid DC power solutions worldwide, announced its financial performance for the quarter ending March 31, 2025.

news.summary: In Lutz, Florida on May 16, 2025, a new tool has been introduced for psychologists and mental health professionals to simplify their evaluation procedures. The Reynolds Intellectual Assessment Scales™, Second Edition Digital Record Form (RIAS™-2 DRF) is a digital platform that aims to enhance assessment processes. This innovation comes as a way to cater to the increased need for efficient mental health evaluations.
news.headline: Psychologists can streamline assessments with RIAS-2 DRF digital platform. Improves test scoring.

news.summary: JAGGAER, a renowned company in Source-to-Pay and Supplier Collaboration, proudly discloses that their esteemed clients TK Elevator (TKE) and Signify have been nominated for the prestigious World Procurement Awards. TK Elevator, a top global player in urban mobility, esteemed for their elevator, escalator, and moving walk solutions, alongside Signify, a leading Dutch lighting corporation, have both secured spots in this esteemed award event. TK Elevator and Signify's exceptional procurement practices have earned them recognition in this renowned global competition.
news.headline: JAGGAER clients TK Elevator and Signify shortlisted for World Procurement Awards in London.

news.summary: In Burlington, North Carolina on May 16, 2025, the American Licorice™ Company announced a collaboration with Alamance Foods to introduce new SOUR PUNCH® flavors under the FUNPOPS® brand of freeze pops. This partnership marks an exciting venture for the company founded in 1914, known for its innovative treats that have captivated consumers over the years. By teaming up, they aim to bring a fusion of sour and frozen treats to the market, combining the beloved flavors of SOUR PUNCH® with the refreshing twist of FUNPOPS®. This collaboration is set to introduce a range of enticing flavors to the market, appealing to a wide audience of consumers looking for unique and delicious treats.
news.headline: American Licorice Company partners with Alamance Foods to launch SOUR PUNCH® flavors with FUNPOPS® brand in 2025.

news.summary: Acer unveiled two latest Nitro Google TV™ smart monitors designed for gaming with high refresh rates, along with a 4K portable monitor. The new Predator QD-OLED gaming monitors were introduced with top-tier features; notably, the Predator X27U F5 boasts a remarkable 500 Hz refresh rate to enhance motion fluidity and gaming experience.
news.headline: New Predator monitors announced with 500 Hz refresh rate and 4K QD-OLED panels. Nitro Google TV™ smart monitors also released with game-ready refresh rates.

news.summary: Renal Denervation via ultrasound, a validated method for treating hypertension, is now accessible to veterans due to the collaboration between Recor Medical and Recon Supply in ST. CHARLES, Missouri. As of May 16, 2025, this breakthrough provides a new avenue for combating high blood pressure, which is called the "silent killer" due to its asymptomatic nature. This partnership ensures that vital treatment is offered to veterans, with an emphasis on improving health outcomes. The initiative aims to address the widespread issue of hypertension, which affects millions of individuals globally. Through this innovative approach, a significant number of veterans can benefit from a proven solution for managing their high blood pressure.
news.headline: Ultrasound Renal Denervation treatment for high blood pressure now available to US veterans through partnership, per PRNewswire.

news.summary: XRP is showing positive signs of a bullish recovery, with a V-shaped pattern targeting $3.40. Open interest for XRP surged 53% to $5.06 billion, signaling bullish sentiment. XRP price is currently at $2.40, up 13% over two weeks. Historically, increased open interest precedes major rallies in XRP price. The funding rates for XRP remain relatively neutral. Analysts predict further gains for XRP if key support levels hold, with a potential increase to $3.40, representing a 40% rise. The relative strength index shows bullish momentum picking up. It is essential for XRP to maintain support levels above $2.40 to sustain a bullish continuation. This article does not provide investment advice; readers are advised to conduct their research before making any financial decisions.
news.headline: XRP poised for $3.40 target as bullish sentiment grows - $5.06B open interest surge signals positive trend.

news.summary: Introducing the latest Acer Iconia V12 and Acer Iconia V11 tablets, boasting sleek all-metal chassis designs and vibrant displays for top-tier entertainment. Providing an impressive battery life of up to 10 hours, these tablets ensure long-lasting performance. Accompanying them is the Acer Connect X6E Plus 5G CPE, a groundbreaking Customer Premises Equipment offering both 5G and Wi-Fi 6E connectivity options for unparalleled speed and stability. Innovatively designed, these products promise a seamless user experience.
news.headline: Acer launches Iconia V12 and Iconia V11 tablets with all-metal chassis, vibrant displays, up to 10 hours of battery life. They also introduce Connect X6E Plus 5G CPE.

news.summary: In Parma Heights, Ohio, on May 16, 2025, a new establishment has emerged - Gina's Gelato and Java. This locally owned shop recently opened its doors on May 7, offering artisan gelato and handcrafted coffee. The grand opening saw an outpouring of support, with Crimson Cup Coffee & Tea's 7 Steps backing the venture.
news.headline: Gina's Gelato and Java opens in Parma Heights on May 7 with Crimson Cup support, offering artisan gelato and coffee.

news.summary: On May 16, 2025, Basel Medical Group Ltd (Nasdaq: BMGL) revealed its commencement of exclusive talks for a US$1 billion BTC acquisition. This move aims to significantly diversify its treasury reserves while keeping its primary focus on expanding medical services. The company's strategic financial endeavor is crucial for fortifying its balance sheet and facilitating the ambitious expansion in Asia's thriving healthcare sectors.
news.headline: Basel Medical Group starting $1B Bitcoin acquisition for treasury reserves, amidst focus on medical service expansion.
